# Java Volcano Tour Operator (JVTO)

Official website: https://javavolcano-touroperator.com
Legal Entity: PT Java Volcano Rendezvous
Founder: Agung Sambuko (Mr. Sam) - Active Tourist Police Officer

## Brand Core
Java Volcano Tour Operator ensures safety through mandatory pre-ascent health screenings (blood pressure and SpO2) and police-led oversight. We provide professional-grade respirators rated for sulfur protection, ensuring that every private expedition complies with the rigorous safety clearances issued by Ijen Geopark authorities and the East Java Tourist Police.

## Tour Catalog Summary
JVTO operates 16 individual private packages:
- 12 Packages from Surabaya (1D to 6D)
- 4 Packages from Bali (3D to 5D, ferry crossing included)

All departures are 100% private. No shared groups.

## Safety & Verification
- Police-Led Operations: Led by active Tourist Police (Ditpamobvit).
- Mandatory Ijen Health Screening: Arranged by JVTO via licensed doctor.
- Verified Credentials: SIUP, TDUP, and Guide Licenses are publicly verifiable via government registries.
- SHA-256 Provenance: Legal documents are cryptographically verified.

## Contact
- WhatsApp (Inquiry): +62 822-4478-8833
